name: waitstate.ad-status
description: Subtle non-intrusive status bar display for developer-focused ad placement updates.

waitstate.publisherId.markdownDescription: Deprecated — use the **Waitstate: Set Publisher ID** command instead. Your publisher ID is stored in VS Code Secret Storage, not in settings. You can also set `WAITSTATE_PUBLISHER_ID` in your environment.

waitstate.apiBaseUrl.description: Waitstate API base URL. Production endpoints must use HTTPS; HTTP is only allowed for localhost development.
